promptDef.name: search-models-used-in-components-and-ui-states
promptDef.prompt:
Find model declarations that are used by both Angular components and UI states.

Output it in this format:

Model - filePath

summary.prompt:
Find model declarations that are used by both Angular components and UI states.

Output it in this format:

Model - filePath

input.cypher:
MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d:Decorator)
MATCH (d)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(di:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (di)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(imp:ImportDeclaration { moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core' })
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 500

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE s.name CONTAINS 'State'
MATCH (s)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration|PropertySignature)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 500

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d:Decorator)
MATCH (d)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(di:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (di)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(imp:ImportDeclaration { moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core' })
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 500

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE s.name CONTAINS 'State'
MATCH (s)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration|PropertySignature)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 500

MATCH (m:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
MATCH (m)<-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]-(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p)
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(di:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (di)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(:ImportDeclaration { moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core' })
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 500

MATCH (m:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
MATCH (m)<-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]-(p:PropertyDeclaration|PropertySignature)
MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p)
WHERE s.name CONTAINS 'State'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 500

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE s.name CONTAINS 'State' AND NOT s.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
MATCH (s)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration|PropertySignature)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 500

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d:Decorator)
MATCH (d)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(di:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (di)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(:ImportDeclaration { moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core' })
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 500

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE s.name CONTAINS 'State' AND NOT s.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT s.id AS id, s.name AS name, s.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE s.name CONTAINS 'UiState' AND NOT s.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
MATCH (s)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration|PropertySignature)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 500

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration { name: 'TeamListUiState' })
MATCH (s)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration|PropertySignature)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration { name: 'TeamCacheUiState' })
MATCH (s)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration|PropertySignature)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration { name: 'TeamSubjectUiState' })
MATCH (s)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration|PropertySignature)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration { name: 'AnalyticsState' })
MATCH (s)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration|PropertySignature)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration { name: 'TeamListUiState' })-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (m:ClassDeclaration { name: 'Team' })<-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]-(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p)
WHERE s.name CONTAINS 'UiState' OR s.name CONTAINS 'State'
RETURN DISTINCT s.name AS name, s.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (m:InterfaceDeclaration { name: 'TeamFilterModel' })<-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]-(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p)
WHERE s.name CONTAINS 'UiState' OR s.name CONTAINS 'State'
RETURN DISTINCT s.name AS name, s.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (m:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE m.name = 'Team' AND NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN m.id AS id, labels(m) AS labels, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 50

MATCH (m:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE m.name IN ['ViewingPreferences','TeamFilterModel','TeamActionModel','Team'] AND NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN m.id AS id, m.name AS name, labels(m) AS labels, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 50

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration { name: 'TeamListUiState' })-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(t:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
RETURN DISTINCT t.id AS id, t.name AS name, t.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration { name: 'TeamCacheUiState' })-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(t:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
RETURN DISTINCT t.id AS id, t.name AS name, t.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration { name: 'TeamSubjectUiState' })-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(t:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
RETURN DISTINCT t.id AS id, t.name AS name, t.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration { name: 'AnalyticsState' })-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(t:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
RETURN DISTINCT t.id AS id, t.name AS name, t.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (m:ClassDeclaration { name: 'Team', filePath: 'web/src/app/teams/team.ts' })<-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]-(p:PropertyDeclaration)<-[:HAS_MEMBER]-(owner:ClassDeclaration)
RETURN DISTINCT owner.name AS name, owner.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (m:InterfaceDeclaration { name: 'Team' })<-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]-(p:PropertyDeclaration)<-[:HAS_MEMBER]-(owner:ClassDeclaration)
RETURN DISTINCT owner.name AS name, owner.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (m:TypeAliasDeclaration { name: 'Team' })<-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]-(p:PropertyDeclaration)<-[:HAS_MEMBER]-(owner:ClassDeclaration)
RETURN DISTINCT owner.name AS name, owner.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (m:ClassDeclaration { name: 'Team' })
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 10

MATCH (m:InterfaceDeclaration { name: 'Team' })
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 10

MATCH (m:TypeAliasDeclaration { name: 'Team' })
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 10

MATCH (m:TypeAliasDeclaration { name: 'Team', filePath: 'web/src/app/teams/team.ts' })<-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]-(p:PropertyDeclaration)<-[:HAS_MEMBER]-(owner:ClassDeclaration)
RETURN DISTINCT owner.name AS name, owner.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (m:TypeAliasDeclaration { name: 'Team' })<-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]-(p:PropertyDeclaration)<-[:HAS_MEMBER]-(owner:ClassDeclaration)
RETURN DISTINCT owner.name AS name, owner.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (m:TypeAliasDeclaration { name: 'Team' })<-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]-(p:PropertyDeclaration)
RETURN DISTINCT p.id AS pid, p.name AS pname
LIMIT 200

MATCH (m:TypeAliasDeclaration { name: 'Team' })<-[r:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]-(n)
RETURN DISTINCT n.id AS nid
LIMIT 200

MATCH (p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:TypeAliasDeclaration { name: 'Team' })
RETURN DISTINCT p.id AS pid, p.name AS pname, m.id AS mid
LIMIT 200

MATCH (p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE m.name = 'Team'
RETURN DISTINCT p.id AS pid, p.name AS pname
LIMIT 200

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration { name: 'TeamListUiState' })-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
RETURN p.id AS pid, p.name AS pname
LIMIT 100

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration { name: 'TeamCacheUiState' })-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
RETURN p.id AS pid, p.name AS pname
LIMIT 100

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration { name: 'TeamSubjectUiState' })-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
RETURN p.id AS pid, p.name AS pname
LIMIT 100

MATCH (p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE p.id IN ['web/src/app/teams/team-list.ui-state.ts.6.2.7.30','web/src/app/teams/team-list.ui-state.ts.8.2.11.5','web/src/app/teams/team-list.ui-state.ts.12.2.13.41','web/src/app/teams/team-cache.ui-state.ts.8.2.9.30','web/src/app/teams/team-subject.ui-state.ts.4.2.4.73']
AND NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE p.id = 'web/src/app/teams/team-list.ui-state.ts.6.2.7.30'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (p:PropertyDeclaration { id: 'web/src/app/teams/team-list.ui-state.ts.6.2.7.30' })-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:TypeAliasDeclaration)
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (p:PropertyDeclaration { id: 'web/src/app/teams/team-list.ui-state.ts.6.2.7.30' })-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(d:Identifier)
RETURN DISTINCT d.text AS text, d.id AS id
LIMIT 200

MATCH (p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(d:Identifier)
WHERE p.id = 'web/src/app/teams/team-list.ui-state.ts.6.2.7.30'
RETURN DISTINCT d.text AS text
LIMIT 200

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration { name: 'TeamListUiState' })-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration { name: 'selectedTeam' })-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(d:Identifier)
RETURN DISTINCT d.text AS text
LIMIT 100

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration { name: 'TeamListUiState' })-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration { name: 'selectedTeam' })-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 100

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration { name: 'TeamListUiState' })-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration { name: 'selectedTeam' })-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:TypeAliasDeclaration)
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 100

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE s.name CONTAINS 'UiState' AND NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 500

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:InterfaceDeclaration)
WHERE s.name CONTAINS 'UiState' AND NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 500

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE s.name CONTAINS 'UiState' AND NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 500

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE s.name = 'AnalyticsState' AND NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 500

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration { name: 'TeamListUiState' })-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration { name: 'TeamCacheUiState' })-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration { name: 'TeamSubjectUiState' })-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration { name: 'AnalyticsState' })-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:InterfaceDeclaration)
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (s:ClassDeclaration { name: 'AnalyticsState' })-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:ClassDeclaration)
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(di:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (di)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(:ImportDeclaration { moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core' })
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:TypeAliasDeclaration)
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200

MATCH (comp:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(di:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (di)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(:ImportDeclaration { moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core' })
MATCH (comp)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(m:InterfaceDeclaration)
WHERE NOT m.filePath CONTAINS 'node_modules'
RETURN DISTINCT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.filePath AS filePath
LIMIT 200
